title: Jira / Monday.com Integration - Searchability for epics, components, etc
excerpt: In our integrations with Jira Server, we are having to scroll tirelessly through these lists because 1) they are not alphebetically ordered and 2) there is no search functionality. Please update!

posts.author: Swoodward (Shannon Woodward)
posts.cookedHtml:
In our integrations with Jira Server, we are having to scroll tirelessly through these lists because 1) they are not alphebetically ordered and 2) there is no search functionality. Please update!
